sentences.arabic: صُلْحُ الْحُدَيْبِيَةِ حَادِثَةٌ بَارِزَةٌ مِنْ حَوَادِثِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ، حَدَثَتْ فِي السَّنَةِ السَّادِسَةِ مِنَ الْهِجْرَةِ عِنْدَمَا أَرَادَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَنْ يَعْتَمِرَ بِأَصْحَابِهِ.
sentences.translation: Hudejbijanski sporazum istaknuti je događaj iz Poslanikove siyre koji se zbio šeste godine po Hidžri, kada je Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, htio obaviti umru sa svojim ashabima.
sentences.translationEn: The Treaty of Hudaybiyyah is a prominent event in the prophetic biography, occurring in the sixth year after the Hijra when the Prophet, peace be upon him, intended to perform Umrah with his Companions.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ مَنَعَتِ الْمُشْرِكُونَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ مِنَ الدُّخُولِ إِلَى مَكَّةَ فِي تِلْكَ السَّنَةِ، فَكَانَ لَا بُدَّ مِنَ التَّفَاوُضِ مَعَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Mušrici su spriječili muslimane da te godine uđu u Mekku, pa je bilo nužno pregovarati s njima.
sentences.translationEn: The polytheists prevented the Muslims from entering Mecca that year, necessitating negotiation.

sentences.arabic: وَظَاهِرُ بُنُودِ الصُّلْحِ كَانَتْ تَبْدُو فِي صَالِحِ الْمُشْرِكِينَ، مِمَّا أَثَارَ اسْتِغْرَابَ بَعْضِ الصَّحَابَةِ كَعُمَرَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ.
sentences.translation: Uvjeti sporazuma naizgled su izgledali u korist mušrika, što je izazvalo čuđenje nekih ashaba, poput Omera ibn Hattaba, radijallahu anhu.
sentences.translationEn: The apparent terms of the treaty seemed to favour the polytheists, which prompted surprise from some Companions such as Umar ibn al-Khattab, may Allah be pleased with him.

sentences.arabic: غَيْرَ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ثَبَتَ عَلَى قَرَارِهِ بِكَمَالِ الثِّقَةِ بِاللهِ وَحُسْنِ التَّوَكُّلِ.
sentences.translation: Međutim, Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, ostao je pri svojoj odluci s punim pouzdanjem u Allaha i lijepim tevekkulom.
sentences.translationEn: Yet the Prophet, peace be upon him, stood firm in his decision with complete trust in Allah and reliance upon Him.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدِ انْكَشَفَ لَاحِقًا أَنَّ هَذَا الصُّلْحَ كَانَ فَتْحًا مُبِينًا، إِذْ فَتَحَ الْبَابَ لِانْتِشَارِ الْإِسْلَامِ وَأَسْلَمَ بَعْدَهُ خَلَائِقُ كَثِيرُونَ.
sentences.translation: Naknadno se otkrilo da je ovaj sporazum bio jasna pobjeda, jer je otvorio vrata širenju islama i nakon njega su primile islam mnoge duše.
sentences.translationEn: It later became clear that this treaty was an evident conquest, as it opened the door to the spread of Islam and many people embraced it afterwards.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي هَذِهِ الْحَادِثَةِ دَرْسٌ عَظِيمٌ يَتَعَلَّمُهُ الْمُسْلِمُ وَهُوَ أَنَّ الصَّبْرَ عَلَى الشِّدَّةِ وَالثِّقَةَ بِحِكْمَةِ اللهِ تُؤَدِّيَانِ فِي النِّهَايَةِ إِلَى النَّصْرِ وَالْفَرَجِ.
sentences.translation: U ovom događaju sadržana je velika pouka — strpljivost u teškoći i povjerenje u Allahovu mudrost konačno dovode do pobjede i olakšanja.
sentences.translationEn: This event holds a great lesson for Muslims: patience in hardship and confidence in Allah's wisdom ultimately lead to victory and relief.
